query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "collectionlora: collecting 50 effects in 1 lora via multi-teacher on-p" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the core mechanism of "Multi-Teacher" knowledge distillation (transferring knowledge from multiple teachers to a student) and the specific technique of using triplet loss to align student outputs with teacher outputs, which is directly relevant to the user's work on collecting multiple effects via multi-teacher on-policy learning.
